entities.name: CHILLI
entities.description: Capsicum annuum L., a nutrient-rich crop susceptible to aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS SPECIES
entities.description: Fungi that contaminate chilli fruits and produce aflatoxins

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: Highly toxic and carcinogenic mycotoxins produced by Aspergillus species

entities.name: AFLATOXIN RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chilli genotypes to resist the production or accumulation of aflatoxins

entities.name: MYCOTOXICOLOGY LABORATORY OF ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The facility where the evaluation of chilli genotypes was conducted during 2019-20

entities.name: ELISA TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A biochemical method used to estimate the aflatoxin content in chilli fruits

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The observed differences in aflatoxin levels among the tested chilli genotypes

entities.name: AFLATOXIN B1
entities.description: A specific type of aflatoxin identified in the contaminated chilli samples

entities.name: IC-334383
entities.description: A chilli genotype that showed low aflatoxin content and resistance to aflatoxin production

entities.name: EC-402113
entities.description: A chilli genotype that showed very high aflatoxin content and susceptibility to aflatoxin production

entities.name: A. FLAVUS
entities.description: A specific species of Aspergillus associated with aflatoxin production in chillies
